features: FULL SET: 28 piece set of hand sewing needles, perfect for a multitude of hand sewing, repairs and crafting techniques
MULTI USE: 6 x tapestry/cross stitch needles, 16 x crewel/embroidery needles, 6 x beading needles
NEEDLE LENGTH: tapestry/cross stitch 3. 6Cm-4. 8cm, crewel 3. 4Cm-4. 4cm, beading 5cm-5. 5cm
HARDENED STEEL: Manufactured from high quality hardened carbon steel to ensure the needles have appropriate strength and flex for fulfilling a multitude of hand sewing applications
Our products are individually tailored to uphold our performance and quality standards, delivering a consistently
description: From the manufacturer Korbond Care & Repair Needle Selections. AVAILABLE NOW More Products From Korbond Care & Repair Dark Mix Thread Selection Pastel Mix Thread Selection Embroidery Floss - 10 skeins Korbond Care & Repair 6-Piece Tapestry/ Cross Stitch Needles/ Beading Needles & 16-piece crewel/Embroidery Needles Korbond Tapestry/ Cross Stitch Needles feature specially designed ballpoints which enable the needle to pass through canvas without tearing or splitting its fibres. These large eyed needles allow the user to thread tapestry wool or floss easily. Contents Include: 6 size 18/24 needles suitable for a range of cross stitch work. Korbond Beading Needles are thin and flexible, ideal for beadwork, accommodating a wide selection of seed beads and decorative sequins. Contents Include: 6 size 10/12 needles suitable for a range of beading work. Korbond Crewel/ Embroidery Needles have specially developed longer eyes compared with standard hand sewing needles making them more suitable for threading stranded cotton or floss. Contents Include: 16 size 3/9 needles suitable for uniformed embroidery. Sold as a bundle Handy Usages For Korbond Needle Bundle Precision Crafting A trio of professional, high quality needles in assorted sizes and sharpness for cross stitch, embroidery and beading projects. Upcycling The ultimate set of needles for adding embroidery or beading embellishments to clothes or upcycling projects around the home. General Crafts The right needle for the right task. A versatile collection of needles for weaving projects, stitching sections of knitting together, adding beading to paper crafts and making jewellery. Around The World This exclusive bundle of needles will come in handy for darning knitwear, repairing broken jewellery, and mending woven rugs, blankets, cushions and seat covers.
